data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-plan support when new events arrive.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Re-plan support when new events arrive', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on bookings and financial validations but do not address the specific requirement of re-planning support, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of re-plan support when new events arrive.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-plan support functionality.
